style_guide: Children's storybook illustration, vibrant adventurous watercolor painting with painterly soft edges and visible brush texture, warm cinematic lighting, rich saturated colors, whimsical sense of wonder and adventure, majestic natural scenery (mountains, meadows, rivers, starry skies), clean balanced storybook composition, gentle and heartwarming mood, 1:1 square format, high detail, no text, no letters, no words, no watermark, no humans, no people.

character_sheet.연우: Yeonwoo, the hero dog: a noble large athletic Akita/Kishu-mix dog with a shimmering silver-white coat that has a faint cool-blue sheen and glows in sunlight, warm amber eyes, perked pointy ears, a small white blaze on the chest, a fluffy curled tail held high, confident kind expression, chin lifted in a proud brave posture.
character_sheet.연아: Yeona, the swift dog: a slender greyhound/sighthound-mix with sleek caramel-tan short fur, crisp white socks on all four legs, very long lean legs built for speed, a narrow elegant face, quick hazel eyes, ears flattening back when running.
character_sheet.다연: Dayeon, the strong dog: a huge powerful mastiff-type with broad shoulders, thick chocolate-brown fur, a cream-colored chest patch, a big square head, gentle droopy jowls, kind dark-brown eyes, enormous paws, gentle giant vibe.
character_sheet.소이: Soi, the clever dog: a small Shiba/fox-mix with bright orange-red fur, cream cheeks and belly, sharp pointed ears, a curled tail, very expressive clever sparkling eyes, often tilting her head while thinking.
character_sheet.태이: Taei, the timid youngest pup: a small fluffy border-collie-type puppy with black-and-white spotted fur, one ear standing up and one ear flopped down, big round shiny eyes, a nervous but brave expression, small and bouncy.
character_sheet.유담: Yudam, the tracker dog: a beagle/basset-mix scent hound with long velvety drooping ears, tricolor fur (white, tan, black), a freckled muzzle, a low sturdy body, a big soft sniffing nose, calm patient eyes.
character_sheet.홍관: Honggwan, the giant red bear (friendly cartoon boss, never scary): a towering broad bear with deep russet fiery-red shaggy fur, a crown-like tuft of darker fur on his head, a proud lifted chin, big round eyes that look stern but kindly, huge rounded soft paws, grand and majestic but drawn in a warm cartoonish storybook style.

items.prompt: Children's storybook cover illustration. A noble silver hero dog stands proudly on a flower-dotted green hilltop at golden hour, chin lifted, fluffy curled tail held high, his silver-white coat glowing in warm sunlight, while five companion dogs gather behind him as a brave little pack, and a majestic blue mountain range with a giant friendly red bear silhouette rises softly in the distance under a warm glowing sky. Yeonwoo, the hero dog: a noble large athletic Akita/Kishu-mix dog with a shimmering silver-white coat with a faint cool-blue sheen, warm amber eyes, perked pointy ears, a small white chest blaze, a fluffy curled tail held high. The five companions: a slender caramel-tan dog with white socks and long legs, a huge chocolate-brown mastiff with a cream chest patch, a small fox-like orange-red dog with cream cheeks, a small black-and-white spotted puppy with one floppy ear, and a tricolor long-eared scent hound. Vibrant adventurous watercolor painting, painterly soft edges, warm cinematic lighting, rich saturated colors, whimsical sense of wonder and adventure, heroic heartwarming composition with the hero centered and generous open sky area at the top for a title. No text, no letters, no words, no watermark, no humans, no people.
